title: glechoma curvidens
intro: Glechoma curvidens, also known as creeping lemon mint or curved-leaf glechoma, is a type of perennial herb in the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. The health benefits of Glechoma curvidens include its ability to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Glechoma curvidens can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used to support digestive health and reduce stress.
